creator: bsd@haps.ca
text:
I'm running 11-stable r324834.
Typing 'ls' while ssh'd in through tmux on a linux machine, I get, along with other stuff:
????????????????????????.txt

But if I do, for example, 'ls|grep txt' I get:
更多精彩资源下载.txt

It's clearly not a display issue, since it can display.  Looks like 'ls' just gets confused by utf.  I had a vague memory that utf in base utils was being discussed, but found nothing relevant.
